List.Title: People
List.Description: The People list is at the heart of TrackMaster. It contains contact information for members, prospective members, and others. Internal (U-M) contacts are automatically updated using MCommunity and Office 365.
List.Name: {B06A7441-867B-4DDC-9F05-271C46D7E116}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: Full name, required only for non-UM contacts. For UM contacts, leave blank to auto-populate.
U-M UniqName (user id), or email address for non-UM contacts.
Field.Name: UniqName
Field.Title: UniqName

Validation.Message: Enter the UniqName only, without @umich.edu or @med.michigan.edu.

Field.CustomFormatter: {"elmType":"div","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px 8px 5px 8px","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis","display":"flex","border-radius":"16px","height":"24px","align-items":"center","white-space":"nowrap","margin":"4px 4px 4px Field.Name: ContactType
Field.Title: Contact Type
Field.Description: Type of contact (e.g. member, prospective member, staff, student).

Field.Name: TeamsAccount
Field.Title: Teams Account
Field.Description: The MS Teams account for this person, if applicable. Only accounts on the same environment as TrackMaster can be used (e.g. Michigan Medicine).

Field.CustomFormatter: {"elmType":"div","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px 8px 5px 8px","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis","display":"flex","border-radius":"16px","height":"24px","align-items":"center","white-space":"nowrap","margin":"4px 4px 4px 4px"},"attributes":{"class":{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Mr."]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgCornflowerBlue sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-CornflowerBlueFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Ms."]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgMintGreen sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-MintGreenFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Mrs."]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgGold sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-GoldFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField",""]},"",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Mx."]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgCoral sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-CoralFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Dr."]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgDustRose sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-DustRoseFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Sir"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgCyan sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-CyanFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Rev. Ing."]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgLightPurple sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-WhiteFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Elder"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgDarkRed sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-color-WhiteFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["@currentField","Choice 20"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgTeal sp-field-fontSizeSmall sp-css-borderColor-neutralSecondary"]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}},"txtContent":"@currentField"}],"templateId":"BgColorChoicePill"}
Field.Name: Honorific
Field.Title: Honorific

Field.Name: FirstName
Field.Title: First Name
Field.Description: First name(s) (surname). If not entered manually, the system will extract this value from the Full Name field or from MCommunity.

Field.Name: LastName
Field.Title: Last Name
Field.Description: Last name(s) (family or given name). If not entered manually, the system will extract this value from the Full Name field or from MCommunity.
Professional credentials (e.g. M.D., Ph.D.), separated by commas.
Field.Name: Credentials
JobTitle
Field.Title: Job Title
Field.Description: The person's current job title. For internal contacts, this is set automatically from MCommunity whenever possible.

Field.Name: Department
Field.Description: Primary department. For internal contacts, this value is updated automatically from MCommunity.

CHOICES.CHOICE: MM Data Off Clin & Transl Rsch
MM DLHS Division of Prof Ed
MM Heinz C. Prechter Bipolar R
MM HITS EDIS Dpt Info Delivery
MM HITS EDIS HIE and DataWorks
MM HITS EI Complex Dvc Int Svc
MM Soc Wrk - Adm & Guest Suprt

Field.Name: Job_x0020_Rank
Field.Description: For members and prospective members, the condensed job title to use for reporting purposes.

Field.Name: Department0
Field.Description: Appointing or primary department, used for center-wide reporting.

Field.Name: SchoolAffiliation
Field.Title: School Affiliation
Field.Description: Primary U-M School affiliation, or P2P school, if applicable.

CHOICES.CHOICE: College of Arts, Sciences and Education - Flint
College of Arts, Sciences, and Letters - Dearborn
College of Education, Health, and Human Services - Dearborn
College of Engineering and Computer Science - Dearborn
College of Innovation and Technology - Flint
Gerald R. Ford School of Public Policy
Institute for Healthcare Policy and Innovation
Institute for Research on Women and Gender
School of Music Theatre and Dance
University of Detroit Jesuit High School and Academy
Ypsilanti Achieving College & Career Education Program (Ypsilanti ACCE)

Field.Name: Company
Field.Description: Company or organization. For P2P, this is typically the school district.

CHOICES.CHOICE: Barb Smith Suicide Resource & Response Network
University of Detroit Jesuit High School and Academy

Field.Name: BusinessPhone
Field.Title: Business Phone
Field.Description: Business or main office phone number.

Field.Name: MobilePhone
Field.Title: Mobile Phone
Field.Description: Mobile phone number.

Field.Name: HomePhone
Field.Title: Home Phone
Field.Description: Home phone number.

Field.Name: FaxNumber
Field.Title: Fax Number
Field.Description: Office fax number.
Email address, which defaults to the user's U-M level 1 email (@umich.edu) unless overridden by the Preferred Email field.
Field.Name: Email

Field.Description: Preferred email address. Only needed for External Contacts or to manually override an @umich.edu address.
Field.Name: PreferredEmail

Validation.Message: Please enter a valid email address.

Field.Description: Additional email.
Field.Name: AdditionalEmail1

Validation.Message: Please enter a valid email address.

Field.Description: Additional email.
Field.Name: AdditionalEmail2

Validation.Message: Please enter a valid email address.

Field.Name: Address
Field.Title: Address
Field.Description: Full mailing address.

Field.Name: City
Field.Title: City
Field.Description: City, district or municipality.

Field.Name: State_x002f_Province
Field.Title: State/Province
Field.Description: State, province, or district.

Field.Name: Country_x002f_Region
Field.Title: Country/Region
Field.Description: Country or region.

Field.Name: Website
Field.Title: Website
Field.Description: Link to this person's professional website or lab website. For members, this value is typically displayed in member profile pages.
External profile page. For members, use the profile page from the appointing department.
Field.Name: ExternalProfile

Field.Description: Bluesky profile handle or URL.
Field.Name: Bluesky
GitHub
Field.Title: GitHub
Field.Description: A link to this person's GitHub or GitLab profile. You can enter the full URL (e.g. https://github.com/gabrielmongefranco) or just the @ name (e.g. @GabrielMongefranco).

Field.Name: LinkedIn
Field.Title: LinkedIn
Field.Description: LinkedIn profile.

Field.Name: Twitter
Field.Title: Twitter
Field.Description: A link to this person's X (Twitter) profile. You can enter the full URL (e.g. https://twitter.com/catygo_sleep) or just the @ name (e.g. @cathygo_sleep).

Field.Name: Facebook
Field.Title: Facebook
Field.Description: Facebook profile.

Field.Name: MREID
Field.Title: MRE ID
Field.Description: Michigan Experts Profile ID or URL.
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","display":"flex","min-width":"180px","padding":"0 2px","margin-left":"2px","margin-right":"4px","text-overflow":"ellipsis","justify-content":"space-between","clear":"both","max-height":"44px"},"attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"},"attributes":{"href":"=if([$MREID]=='', 'https://experts.umich.edu/search?by=text&type=user&v=' + [$Title], if(startsWith([$MREID],'https:') || startsWith([$MREID],'http:') || indexOf([$MREID],'/')>0, [$MREID], 'https://experts.umich.edu/' + [$MREID]) )","target":"_blank","title":"=if([$MREID]=='','Michigan Experts Profile not set. Click to search by name.', 'Visit Michigan Experts Profile.')","class":"ms-fontSize-12 ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(@currentField=='', 'NewsSearch', 'Education')","class":"sp-field-quickAction ms-fontSize-16"},"style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","padding-left":"2px","padding-right":"3px"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if([$MREID]=='', 'Search by name', if(indexOf([$MREID],'/')>0, substring([$MREID], lastIndexOf([$MREID],'/')+1, 48), [$MREID]) )","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-12"},"style":{"padding-left":"3px","padding-right":"2px","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"}}]}]}

Field.Name: ORCID
Field.Title: ORCID
Field.Description: Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCiD) or URL.
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","display":"flex","min-width":"180px","padding":"0 2px","margin-left":"2px","margin-right":"4px","text-overflow":"ellipsis","justify-content":"space-between","clear":"both","max-height":"44px"},"attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"},"attributes":{"href":"=if([$ORCID]=='', 'https://orcid.org/orcid-search/search?searchQuery=' + [$Title], if(startsWith([$ORCID],'https:') || startsWith([$ORCID],'http:') || indexOf([$ORCID],'/')>0, [$ORCID], 'https://orcid.org/' + [$ORCID]) )","target":"_blank","title":"=if([$ORCID]=='','Researcher ORCiD not set. Click to search by name.', 'Visit published works at ORCiD.org.')","class":"ms-fontSize-12 ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(@currentField=='', 'NewsSearch', 'Library')","class":"sp-field-quickAction ms-fontSize-16"},"style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","padding-left":"2px","padding-right":"3px"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if([$ORCID]=='', 'Search by name', if(indexOf( replaceAll(replaceAll([$ORCID],'my-orcid?',''),'orcid=',''), '/')>0, substring( replaceAll(replaceAll([$ORCID],'my-orcid?',''),'orcid=',''), lastIndexOf( replaceAll(replaceAll([$ORCID],'my-orcid?',''),'orcid=',''), '/')+1, 48), replaceAll(replaceAll([$ORCID],'my-orcid?',''),'orcid=','') ) )","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-12"},"style":{"padding-left":"3px","padding-right":"2px","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"}}]}]}

Field.Description: Scopus ID (for researchers).
Field.Name: Scopus
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","display":"flex","min-width":"180px","padding":"0 2px","margin-left":"2px","margin-right":"4px","text-overflow":"ellipsis","justify-content":"space-between","clear":"both","max-height":"44px"},"attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"},"attributes":{"href":"=if([$Scopus]=='', 'https://www.scopus.com/results/results.uri?s=AUTH(' + [$Title] + ')', if(startsWith([$Scopus],'https:') || startsWith([$Scopus],'http:') || indexOf([$Scopus],'/')>0, [$Scopus], 'https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=' + [$Scopus]) )","target":"_blank","title":"=if([$Scopus]=='','Researcher Scopus not set. Click to search by name.', 'Visit published works at Scopus.org.')","class":"ms-fontSize-12 ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(@currentField=='', 'NewsSearch', 'Library')","class":"sp-field-quickAction ms-fontSize-16"},"style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","padding-left":"2px","padding-right":"3px"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if([$Scopus]=='', 'Search by name', if(indexOf([$Scopus],'/')>0, substring( replaceAll(replaceAll([$Scopus],'detail.uri?',''),'authorId=',''), lastIndexOf( replaceAll(replaceAll([$Scopus],'detail.uri?',''),'authorId=',''), '/')+1, 48), replaceAll(replaceAll([$Scopus],'detail.uri?',''),'authorId=','') ) )","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-12"},"style":{"padding-left":"3px","padding-right":"2px","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"}}]}]}

Field.Description: Short biography, for use in websites, conferences, newsletters and other communications.
Field.Name: Biography
Notes
Field.Title: Notes
Field.Description: Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
Is this person a member of this Center or Institute?
Field.Name: CenterMember
CenterMembershipJoinDate
Field.Title: Center Membership Join Date
Field.Description: The date when this person became a member. This field is set manually or when a person is added to the membership group.
List of groups in which this user is a member. Groups can be configured in the Groups List.
Field.Name: Group_x0020_Membership
ReferralSource
Field.Title: Referral Source
Field.Description: The person, core, team, vendor or website that referred this person to the center. Typically this would be the first core or team that provided a service to this person.

Field.Name: PrimaryInvestigator
Field.Title: Primary Investigator
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person is a PI.

Field.Name: StudyTeamMember
Field.Title: Study Team Member
Field.Description: Indicates whether this staff member is a study team member. For PIs, say No.
The primary principal investigator that this study team member works under. For PIs, leave this field blank.
Field.Name: PrimaryPI

Field.Description: The primary lab which this study team member reports. Please format as: "LabName (PI FullName)".
Field.Name: PrimaryLab
HasReceivedServices
Field.Title: Has Received Services
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person has ever received services (e.g. consultations, awards, program participation). This value can be set manually, or if empty, it is set automatically based on history.

Field.Name: LastServiceDate
Field.Title: Last Service Date
Field.Description: The date when this person last received a service (e.g. consultation, award, program participation). It can be set manually, or if left blank, it is auto-calculated based on history.

Field.Name: HasAttendedEvents
Field.Title: Has Attended Events
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person has ever attended events hosted by this center. This value can be set manually, or if empty, it is set when an Event Summary is added that includes this person as a registrant, attendee or speaker.

Field.Name: LastEventAttndanceDate
Field.Title: Last Event Attendance Date
Field.Description: The date when this person last attended an event hosted by this center. It can be set manually, or if left blank, it is auto-calculated based on Event Summary entries that include this person as a registrant, attendee or speaker.

Field.Name: PrimaryTeamEngagement
Field.Title: Primary Team Engagement
Field.Description: For team members, this is their primary team. For all other contacts, this is the team that maintains the relationship with this person, if applicable.
The research area focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: ResearchAreas

Field.Description: The research methodology and applications focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: ResearchMethodologies

Field.Description: The population focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: Populations
TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.

Field.Name: Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person can be or has been considered for a speaking engagement or presentation at a University of Michigan event.

Field.Name: External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person can be or has been considered for a speaking engagement or presentation outside of University of Michigan. For external contacts, it indicates whether they can be or have been speakers at U-M events.

Field.Name: Earned_x0020_Media_x003f_
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person has ever earned media coverage for their professional work.
The type of record in MCommunity, if any.
Field.Name: MCommunityRole

Field.Description: If checked, this person has opted out of receiving communications. The specific channels to which they unsubscribed can be found in the Do Not Contact List.
Field.Name: DoNotContact

Field.Description: The display name for this person, formatted for use in drop-down menus in other lists.
Field.Name: DisplayName
Field.FormulaDisplayNames: =[Full Name]&" ("&UniqName&")"&IF(TRUE,"",CONCATENATE(ID,[Full Name],[Contact Type],Email)&CONCATENATE([Job Title],[Job Rank],[Department (MCommunity)],[School Affiliation],Company)&CONCATENATE([Has Received Services],[Has Attended Events],[Last Service Date],[Last Event Attendance Date],Active,[📷]))

Field.Description: Contact name, pre-formatted with profile pictures and a custom menu.
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","defaultHoverField":"","attributes":{"class":"height-limit hero ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"display":"flex","min-width":"180px","padding":"0 2px","margin-left":"2px","margin-right":"4px","text-overflow":"ellipsis","justify-content":"space-between","clear":"both","max-height":"44px"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","defaultHoverField":"[$TeamsAccount]","style":{"padding":"2px"},"children":[{"elmType":"img","style":{"width":"36px","min-width":"32px","height":"36px","overflow":"hidden","border-radius":"50%","margin":"2px","padding-right":"2px"},"attributes":{"src":"=if(lastIndexOf([$ProfilePictureURL]+'~','~')>2, [$ProfilePictureURL], if(length([$TeamsAccount])==0, @currentWeb + '/_layouts/15/userphoto.aspx?size=S', @currentWeb + '/_layouts/15/userphoto.aspx?size=M&accountName=' + [$TeamsAccount.email]))","title":"=if(length([$TeamsAccount])==0, if([$Title]=='', [$UniqName], [$Title]) + if([$Job_x0020_Rank]=='', if([$JobTitle]=='', '', ' | '+[$JobTitle]), ' | '+[$Job_x0020_Rank]) + if([$Appointing_x0020_Department_x003]=='', if([$Department]=='', '', ' | '+[$Department]), ' | '+ [$Appointing_x0020_Department_x003]), '')"}}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"padding-left":"2px"},"attributes":{"class":"ms-Link ms-fontSize-14 ms-fontWeight-semibold"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","style":{"cursor":"pointer","whitespace":"collapse","user-select":"text","padding-left":"4px","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis","min-width":"1480px","text-align":"left","text-decoration":"=if(indexOf([$Active]+'~','~')<1 || [$Active], 'inherit', 'line-through')","color":"=if(indexOf([$Active]+'~','~')<1 || [$Active], 'inherit', 'gray')"},"txtContent":"=if([$Title]=='', [$UniqName], [$Title]) + ' '","customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"}}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"cursor":"pointer","padding-left":"6px","min-width":"12px","text-align":"right","margin-left":"auto"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"href":"=if(indexOf([$Email]+'~','~')>1, 'mailto:' + [$Email], if(length([$TeamsAccount])>0, if(indexOf([$TeamsAccount.email]+'~','~')>1, 'mailto:' + [$TeamsAccount.email], if( indexOf([$UniqName]+'~','@')>0, 'mailto:' + [$UniqName], if(indexOf([$UniqName]+'~','~')>0, 'mailto:' + [$UniqName] + '@umich.edu', ''))), if(indexOf([$UniqName]+'~','@')>0, 'mailto:' + [$UniqName], if(indexOf([$UniqName]+'~','~')>0, 'mailto:' + [$UniqName] + '@umich.edu', ''))))","target":"_blank"},"style":{"padding-right":"4px"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(indexOf([$Email]+'~','~')<1 && length([$TeamsAccount])<1, 'MailUndelivered', 'Mail')","class":"ms-fontSize-16 ms-fontWeight-regular ms-fontColor-themePrimary","title":"=if(indexOf([$Email]+'~','~')<1, if(length([$TeamsAccount])<1, 'Email not available in this view.', [$TeamsAccount.email]) , [$Email])"},"style":{"color":"=if(indexOf([$Email]+'~','~')<1 && length([$TeamsAccount])<1, 'gray', 'inherit')"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"padding-left":"6px"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"href":"=if(length([$TeamsAccount])>0, 'https://teams.microsoft.com/l/chat/0/0?users=' + [$TeamsAccount.email], '')","target":"=if(length([$TeamsAccount])>0, '_blank', '_self')"},"style":{"padding-right":"4px"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"iconName":"OfficeChat","class":"ms-fontSize-16 ms-fontWeight-regular ms-fontColor-themePrimary","title":"=if(length([$TeamsAccount])>0, 'Chat or call in MS Teams', '(No Teams Account)')"},"style":{"color":"=if(length([$TeamsAccount])>0, 'inherit', 'gray')"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"padding-left":"6px","display":"=if(indexOf([$HasReceivedServices]+'~','~')<1, 'none', 'inherit')"},"children":[{"elmType":"button","style":{"padding-right":"4px","cursor":"pointer","text-decoration":"none","border":"0","background-color":"inherit","padding":"0","margin":"0","font-weight":"inherit"},"attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-16 ms-fontWeight-regular ms-fontColor-themePrimary"},"customRowAction":{"action":"embed","actionInput":{"src":"=@currentWeb + '/_layouts/15/search.aspx/siteall?env=WebView&customRefiners=%7B%22SPContentType%22%3A%5B%22Item%22%5D%7D&q=' + [$Title] + '&s=1af593ea-7cc2-4a0d-8bad-de74ab9b386f_a453414d-690e-4ccc-9ea2-468bb8f09056&scope=site&sid=1af593ea-7cc2-4a0d-8bad-de74ab9b386f&action=view&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","height":"540","width":"920"}},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"iconName":"Search","class":"ms-fontSize-16 ms-fontWeight-regular ms-fontColor-themePrimary","title":"Search in all TrackMaster lists"},"style":{"color":"inherit"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"heroCommands show"},"style":{"cursor":"pointer","padding-left":"6px","padding-right":"2px","margin-right":"4px","min-width":"10px","text-align":"right"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"class":"heroCommands show sp-field-quickAction moreActionsHeroField heroButton ms-font-l ms-fontWeight-semiBold ms-fontColor-themeLight ms-borderColor-themePrimary ms-borderColor-themePrimary--hover ms-backgroundColor-themeDark--hover","iconName":"moreVertical"},"customCardProps":{"directionalHint":"rightCenter","openOnEvent":"hover","isBeakVisible":true,"beakStyle":{"backgroundColor":"lightGray"},"formatter":{"elmType":"div","children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-borderColor-themeLight ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover ms-slideRightIn20"},"style":{"border":"1px solid"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","children":[{"elmType":"div","children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeSecondary ms-fontColor-themeLighterAlt","title":"='User ID: '+[$ID]"},"style":{"font-weight":"500","text-align":"left","margin-top":"0px","margin-bottom":"10px","border-bottom":"1px solid","padding-right":"12px","padding-left":"12px","padding-top":"6px","padding-bottom":"6px"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=[$Title]"},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"='\n(' + [$UniqName] + ')'","font-size":"smaller"}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"ContactInfo"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Open","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"customRowAction":{"action":"editProps"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"Edit"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Edit","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"href":"=if(indexOf([$ContactType]+'','Member')>=0, @currentWeb + '/Lists/Engagement%20History/AllItems.aspx?q=' + [$Title] + '&action=view&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People' , @currentWeb + '/Lists/Engagement%20History/AllItems.aspx?useFiltersInViewXml=1&FilterField1=Recipient&FilterType1=LookupMulti&FilterOp1=In&FilterValue1=' + [$Title] + '&action=view&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","target":"_top","title":"=if(indexOf([$HasReceivedServices]+'~','~')<1, '', if([$HasReceivedServices], 'Last consultation: ' + toLocaleDateString([$LastServiceDate]), 'No consultation history.'))"},"style":{"text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","color":"=if(indexOf([$HasReceivedServices]+'~','~')<1 || [$HasReceivedServices], 'inherit', 'gray')"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"History"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Consultations","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"href":"=@currentWeb + '/Lists/EmailTracker/Summary.aspx?q=' + [$Title] + '&action=view&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","target":"_top","title":"Find in Email Tracker"},"style":{"text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","color":"inherit"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"MailSchedule"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Email Tracker","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"href":"=@currentWeb + '/Lists/Event%20Attendance/AllEvents.aspx?q=' + [$Title] + '&action=view&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","target":"_top","title":"=if(indexOf([$HasAttendedEvents]+'~','~')<1, '', if([$HasAttendedEvents], 'Last event attended: ' + toLocaleDateString([$LastEventAttndanceDate]), 'No event history.'))"},"style":{"text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","color":"=if(indexOf([$HasAttendedEvents]+'~','~')<1 || [$HasAttendedEvents], 'inherit', 'gray')"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"Calendar"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Events","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer","display":"=if((indexOf([$Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_]) || (indexOf([$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_]), 'inherit', 'none')"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"href":"=@currentWeb + '/Lists/Event%20Attendance/SpeakersTimeline.aspx?FilterField1=Speakers&FilterValue1=' + [$Title] + '&FilterType1=LookupMulti&FilterOp1=In&action=view&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","target":"_top","title":"=if(indexOf([$Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_], 'Internal' + if(indexOf([$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_],' & External',''), if(indexOf([$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_], 'External', 'No Known History as a')) + ' Speaker.'"},"style":{"text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","color":"=if((indexOf([$Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_]) || (indexOf([$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_]+'~','~')>0 && [$External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_]), 'inherit', 'gray')"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"Microphone"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Speaker's History","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"customRowAction":{"action":"executeFlow","actionParams":"{\"id\":\"78a864c0-f5f9-ef11-be1f-000d3a3b8151\", \"headerText\":\"Auto-Update Contact\", \"runFlowButtonText\":\"Update Now\"}"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"Flow"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Auto-Update Contact Info","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"data-interception":"off","title":"Setup an alert to get notified of chages to this record.","href":"=@currentWeb + '/_layouts/15/SubNew.aspx?List=' + '%7Bb06a7441-867b-4ddc-9f05-271c46d7e116%7D' + '&ID=' + [$ID] + '&IsDlg=1&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","target":"_blank","class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"AlarmClock"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Alert Me","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer","text-decoration":"none"},"children":[{"elmType":"button","attributes":{"data-interception":"off","title":"Version History","name":"='Versions-'+[$ID]","id":"='Versions-'+[$ID]","class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"customRowAction":{"action":"embed","actionInput":{"src":"=@currentWeb + '/_layouts/15/versions.aspx?List=' + '%7Bb06a7441-867b-4ddc-9f05-271c46d7e116%7D' + '&ID=' + [$ID] + '&IsDlg=1&Source=' + @currentWeb + '/Lists/People'","height":"540","width":"920"}},"style":{"cursor":"pointer","text-decoration":"none","border":"0","background-color":"inherit","padding":"0","margin":"0"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"History"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600","font-size":"smaller"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Version History","style":{"margin-left":"9px","font-weight":"lighther","font-size":"smaller"}}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-themeLight--hover ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"style":{"margin":"5px","padding":"5px","cursor":"pointer","font-size":"smaller"},"customRowAction":{"action":"setValue","actionInput":{"Active":"No"}},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"Delete"},"style":{"margin-left":"5px","font-weight":"600"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"Inactivate (Archive)","style":{"margin-left":"9px"}}]}]}]}]}}}]}]}
Field.Name: ContactName
Field.FormulaDisplayNames: =[Full Name]&IF(TRUE,"",CONCATENATE(ID,UniqName,[Full Name],[Contact Type],Email)&CONCATENATE([Job Title],[Job Rank],[Department (MCommunity)],[School Affiliation],Company)&CONCATENATE([Has Received Services],[Has Attended Events],[Last Service Date],[Last Event Attendance Date],Active,[📷]))

Field.Description: URL to profile picture, either from a file attached to this item or from an allowed domain (dc.org, umich.edu, AWS). When set, this picture takes prescedence over MS Teams and MCommunity profile pictures in certain places, such as the Full Name field (which is formatted to display a picture next to the name).
Field.Name: ProfilePictureURL
Active
Field.Title: Active
Field.Description: Indicates whether this record is active (enabled). Inactive records are hidden by default, and are not used in any automations.

Internal field used for propagating certain key fields to other lists, without requiring multiple lookup columns. Do not update manually. Format: |ID|FullName|UniqName|ContactType|TeamsAccount|PI_ID|PI_Name|LastServiceDate|
Field.Name: _SysProfile

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last version that was modified automatically. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysVersion

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last workflow that modified this item. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysFlow
Author
Field.Description: The person or account who created this record (author).

Field.Name: Appointing_x0020_Department_x003
Field.Description: Appointing or primary department, used for center-wide reporting.

Field.Name: Created
Field.Description: The date when this record was created.

Field.Name: Modified
Field.Description: The date when this record was last updated.

Field.Name: Editor
Field.Description: The last person or account who updated this record.
